title: Week 1 — Setup and First Win
summary: Claude Code setup, first session confidence, and your first working assistant.

title: Week 2 — Claude Code Foundations + Prompting Fundamentals
summary: Use Claude Code more safely and improve how you ask for work.
artifactGoal: Tiny Useful Builder App + Starter Prompt Pack

title: Week 3 — Claude Cowork + Prompt Templates
summary: Turn messy folders into structured work and build reusable task prompts.

title: Week 4 — OpenClaw Runtime + Mini Capstone
summary: Stand up a runtime, connect one interface, and validate a real assistant loop.

title: Week 5 — MCP, Skills, Hooks, Subagents, and Context Engineering
summary: Add reusable builder assets and improve the context quality of the spine project.

title: Week 6 — RAG and Agentic RAG
summary: Ground the system in documents and add a more agentic research flow.

title: Week 7 — Orchestration, Harnesses, Workflow Studio, Evaluation, and Safety
summary: Move from one workflow to coordinated reviewable agent work.

title: Week 8 — Deployment, Docs, and Final Capstone
summary: Deploy, document, observe, and package the full system.
